hero.descripcion: Architectures, firmware, automation, and software. Explore open projects, technical documentation, and tools developed for those who need to take their systems further.

ecosistema.texto: Everything runs for free on Cloudflare and GitHub.

early.descripcion: Members will see this content 30 days before the public.

chipDescripcion: Each chip represents an ESP32 connected to our platform.
